creator: rjoseph@mammalia.org
text:
This is an update of the Blue Moon Rendering Tools port.  However, the 
software has now been changed to link with Mesa dynamically, and there is
apparently a bug in /compat/linux/lib/ld.so which keeps this from happening.

Fix: Here is the updated port but not a fix for the dynamic linking problem.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install the new port.  Try to run one of the programs installed by the port, 
such as "rendrib" or "iv".  You should get a message saying:

BUG IN DYNAMIC LINKER ld.so: dl-version.c: 210: _dl_check_map_versions: Assertion `needed != ((void *)0)' failed!
